# cellSize()

**Instance Method**

Returns the cell size.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func cellSize() -> NSSize
```

## Return Value

The current size for the cells in the image browser view.

## Setting and Getting Cell Size

- **setCellSize(_:)**: Sets the cell  size.
